title: Duplicate multiple pulses with new updates/ info box information
excerpt: Is there a way to have one pulse dependent on another and anytime updates or info boxes are added to one pulse it updates on another pulse?

posts.author: epfingsten (emma pfingsten)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to have one pulse dependent on another and anytime updates or info boxes are added to one pulse it updates on another pulse?
